rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value thresholds. Educ. Code §1001.251 governs driver education instructor licensing. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: a person may not teach or provide driver education or conduct any phase of driver education unless the person holds a driver education instructor license issued by the executive director.
_note: No relationship between proposed property-tax change and driver education instructor licensing statute.
